title: Tunisian Prawn Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and spicy Tunisian-inspired fried rice dish loaded with succulent prawns. This easy-to-make recipe is perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: tunisian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most spice stores or online

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped carrots, peas, and onions, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the Tunisian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the prawns and cook until pink and fully cooked.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the fried onions and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
